prompt:
Create a Python file called build_scene.py that uses the pxr library (Pixar USD) to programmatically build a USD scene and export it as scene.usda. The scene must contain:

1. A root prim /World (Xform) set as the default prim
2. /World/Ground — a Mesh prim representing a ground plane (UsdGeom.Mesh with points for a quad, faceVertexCounts=[4], faceVertexIndices=[0,1,2,3])
3. /World/Ground with xformOp:translate set to (0, 0, 0)
4. /World/Character — an Xform prim with xformOp:translate at (0, 1, 0)
5. /World/Character/Body — a Mesh prim (can be a simple cube with 8 points, 6 faces)
6. /World/Light — a DomeLight (UsdLux.DomeLight) with intensity=1000
7. /World/Looks/GroundMaterial — a UsdShade.Material with a UsdPreviewSurface shader that has diffuseColor=(0.3, 0.3, 0.3)
8. The Ground mesh must be bound to GroundMaterial using UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775563862493,"sessionID":"ses_29825f9beffeAgwElSIX6fYzwn","part":{"id":"prt_d67da6e23001i3TU9NMNmko7pj","sessionID":"ses_29825f9beffeAgwElSIX6fYzwn","messageID":"msg_d67da0a96001bZzuXdpDESIbw8","type":"tool","callID":"call_0917f14f48a549c4a8d9b4de","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf

stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("scene.usda")

world_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/World")
world_prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath("/World")
stage.SetDefaultPrim(world_prim)

ground_mesh = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/World/Ground")
ground_mesh.CreatePointsAttr([
    (-5, 0, -5),
    (5, 0, -5),
    (5, 0, 5),
    (-5, 0, 5)
])
ground_mesh.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])
ground_mesh.CreateFaceVertexIndicesAttr([0, 1, 2, 3])
ground_mesh.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 0, 0))

character_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/World/Character")
character_xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))

body_mesh = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/World/Character/Body")
body_mesh.CreatePointsAttr([
    (-0.5, -0.5, -0.5),
    (0.5, -0.5, -0.5),
    (0.5, 0.5, -0.5),
    (-0.5, 0.5, -0.5),
    (-0.5, -0.5, 0.5),
    (0.5, -0.5, 0.5),
    (0.5, 0.5, 0.5),
    (-0.5, 0.5, 0.5)
])
body_mesh.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])
body_mesh.CreateFaceVertexIndicesAttr([
    0, 1, 2, 3,
    4, 5, 6, 7,
    0, 1, 5, 4,
    2, 3, 7, 6,
    0, 3, 7, 4,
    1, 2, 6, 5
])

dome_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/World/Light")
dome_light.CreateIntensityAttr(1000)

looks_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/World/Looks", "Scope")

ground_material = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/World/Looks/GroundMaterial")
preview_surface = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, "/World/Looks/GroundMaterial/PreviewSurface")
preview_surface.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")
preview_surface.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.3, 0.3, 0.3))
ground_material.CreateSurfaceOutput().ConnectToSource(preview_surface.ConnectableAPI(), "surface")

ground_prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath("/World/Ground")
material_binding_api = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(ground_prim)
material_binding_api.Bind(ground_material)

stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

files.content:
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf

stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("scene.usda")

world_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/World")
world_prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath("/World")
stage.SetDefaultPrim(world_prim)

ground_mesh = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/World/Ground")
ground_mesh.CreatePointsAttr([(-5, 0, -5), (5, 0, -5), (5, 0, 5), (-5, 0, 5)])
ground_mesh.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])
ground_mesh.CreateFaceVertexIndicesAttr([0, 1, 2, 3])
ground_mesh.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 0, 0))

character_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/World/Character")
character_xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))

body_mesh = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/World/Character/Body")
body_mesh.CreatePointsAttr(
    [
        (-0.5, -0.5, -0.5),
        (0.5, -0.5, -0.5),
        (0.5, 0.5, -0.5),
        (-0.5, 0.5, -0.5),
        (-0.5, -0.5, 0.5),
        (0.5, -0.5, 0.5),
        (0.5, 0.5, 0.5),
        (-0.5, 0.5, 0.5),
    ]
)
body_mesh.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])
body_mesh.CreateFaceVertexIndicesAttr(
    [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 0, 1, 5, 4, 2, 3, 7, 6, 0, 3, 7, 4, 1, 2, 6, 5]
)

dome_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/World/Light")
dome_light.CreateIntensityAttr(1000)

looks_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/World/Looks", "Scope")

ground_material = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/World/Looks/GroundMaterial")
preview_surface = UsdShade.Shader.Define(
    stage, "/World/Looks/GroundMaterial/PreviewSurface"
)
preview_surface.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")
preview_surface.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(
    Gf.Vec3f(0.3, 0.3, 0.3)
)
ground_material.CreateSurfaceOutput().ConnectToSource(
    preview_surface.ConnectableAPI(), "surface"
)

ground_prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath("/World/Ground")
material_binding_api = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(ground_prim)
material_binding_api.Bind(ground_material)

stage.GetRootLayer().Save()
